julesThoughtProcess: Analyzing new portrait capture. 1-bit high-contrast aesthetic detected. The image features a display screen showing a shark graphic and some retro-styled UI elements. Generating narrative for the new entrant.
storyPanel: A pirate broadcast interrupts the corporate feed. The infamous 'ByteShark' collective broadcasts their signature digital calling card, signaling the start of a new data heist on the neon-lit datashores.
